---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve surbanai
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened. Include logs or screenshots if applicable.

**Environment:**
 - OS: [e.g. NixOS]
 - Browser: [e.g. Firefox]
 - SurrealDB Version: [e.g. 2.3.10]
 - React Version: [e.g. 18]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
